cases.query: create a design discussion for the CRISPY spec
expectations: The response reads the spec file and infers the project from its vault location
The response reads project agents.md and lessons.md for context
The response produces a DD document with all 6 sections: Current State, Desired End State, Patterns Found, Approach Options, Resolved Decisions, Open Questions
The DD document is approximately 200 lines and saved to the project's designs/{date}/ directory
cases.notes: Core invocation — must produce a complete DD document with all sections

expectations: The response triggers the design skill correctly from shorthand
The response asks for the spec path if not provided
The response generates the DD document using the template structure
cases.notes: Shorthand trigger — 'DD for this spec' should activate the skill

cases.query: create a design discussion for 02_Projects/{{ORG}} Hub/specs/SPC - Chat Widget.md
expectations: The response checks for review artifacts in the project's reviews/ directory
The response reads scope-analysis.md, context-brief.md, and spec-review.md if they exist
The review findings are incorporated into the DD sections (especially Patterns Found and Current State)
cases.notes: Spec with review artifacts — must read and incorporate prior review analysis

cases.query: let's discuss the design for the auth middleware spec
expectations: The response presents each Open Question to the user via AskUserQuestion one at a time
Answered questions are moved to the Resolved Decisions table with rationale
The response does NOT bundle multiple questions into a single prompt
cases.notes: Open questions flow — must use AskUserQuestion one at a time per CLAUDE.md rules

cases.query: create a plan for this spec
expectations: The response does NOT produce a DD document
cases.notes: Planning request — this is /plan-spec territory, not /design

expectations: The response does NOT produce a DD document
cases.notes: Review request — this is /review-spec territory, not /design
